To the Human Resources Department  
Punjab Provincial Cooperative Bank Limited  

Dear Hiring Committee,  

I am writing to express my interest in the Deputy Head Risk Management position at Punjab Provincial Cooperative Bank Limited. With a strong background in risk management and a commitment to excellence, I am confident in my ability to contribute to the successful operations of the bank.  

I have extensive experience in risk assessment, compliance, and strategic planning, which aligns with the responsibilities of this role. My track record includes leading teams to implement effective risk mitigation strategies and ensuring adherence to regulatory standards. I am particularly interested in supporting the bank’s mission of fostering financial inclusion and promoting sustainable growth.  

I am eager to bring my expertise and passion for risk management to Punjab Provincial Cooperative Bank Limited, where I can make a meaningful impact. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and experiences can contribute to the bank’s continued success.  

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing this opportunity further.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
